name: Covenant of the Rainbow
oracleText:
When Covenant of the Rainbow enters the battlefield, draw a card.
Creatures you control have ward {1}.
At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.
flavorText: "I do set my bow in the cloud, and it shall be for a token of a covenant." — Genesis 9:13
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses the reusable Wikimedia Commons Medhurst rainbow illustration from Genesis 8.
